finding: Chain resolution algorithm missing — tip computation, orphans, tie-breaker
rationale: §6.5 already defines the algorithm in 5 deterministic steps including orphan handling; ChatGPT missed existing prose

finding: Ordering / timestamp field missing on artefacts — resolver ordering guarantee unstated
rationale: §6.5 resolver did not state its ordering guarantee; added arrival-position and tie-breaker note

finding: relatedArtefactIds too loose — relatedArtefactType semantic hints enum suggested
rationale: BriefArtefactBase field is in briefResultContract.ts on main; out of scope for this spec; contract-revision task

finding: Approval execution edge cases — orphaned execution, timeout→failed, heartbeat unspecified
rationale: Execution lifecycle belongs in docs/brief-result-contract.md on BriefApprovalCard.executionStatus; out of spec scope

finding: Budget context enforcement underspecified — what happens on exceed; pre/post check; ownership
rationale: BriefBudgetContext semantics + enforcement ownership are in briefResultContract.ts; spec already references runCostBreaker; no in-spec gap

finding: filtersApplied: [] guard — empty array must be explicitly emitted vs omitted
rationale: filtersApplied is on BriefStructuredResult in briefResultContract.ts; semantic rules belong there; out of scope

finding: Error code enum not formally defined — unsupported_query, provider_error etc. lack canonical list
rationale: Canonical enum in briefResultContract.ts; added in-spec note in §6.4 directing implementers to keep error codes in sync with contract

finding: Duplicate changelog entry — v1 (this version) and v1 (initial) both present
rationale: No changelog section exists in this spec file; finding targets docs/universal-brief-dev-brief.md which is out of scope

finding: Repetition in RLS section — Primary enforcement clause repeated
rationale: Repetition is intentional defence-in-depth readability; each section is self-contained on purpose; stylistic preference with no functional impact

finding: columns optional but recommended — minimum shape expectation (name + type) not defined
rationale: BriefColumnHint minimum shape belongs in briefResultContract.ts; out of scope for this spec

finding: Partial-chain / multiple candidate tips — resolver behaviour under incomplete local knowledge unspecified
rationale: Real distributed-systems edge case not addressed in §6.5; added Partial-knowledge behaviour paragraph with MUST-render-all / MUST-converge obligations

finding: Execution terminal guarantee — every execution must eventually reach completed or failed
rationale: Execution lifecycle belongs in docs/brief-result-contract.md; consistent with R1-F4 deferral; spec does not own executionStatus semantics

finding: budgetContext descriptive-only / enforcement ownership still slightly unclear
rationale: BriefBudgetContext field semantics in briefResultContract.ts; consistent with R1-F5 deferral; no in-spec gap

finding: source must be surfaced when trust-affecting — rendering obligation unstated
rationale: Client rendering obligation for source is in-spec territory (§8.3); added MUST-surface bullet with stale-canonical and hybrid conditions

finding: v1/v1 duplicate changelog in contract file — still present
rationale: Targets docs/brief-result-contract.md merged to main; out of scope; consistent with R1-F8 reject reasoning (different artefact, same disposition)
